(NASDAQ: SMCI), a Total IT Solution Provider for Cloud Computing, AI/ML, Storage, and 5G/Edge, today unveiled its upcoming system portfolio powered by the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform. As data centers transform into AI factories, producing intelligence at massive scale, agentic reasoning, long-context AI, and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) workloads are driving demand for an entirely new class of compute and storage infrastructure. headline: NVIDIA Launches BlueField-4 STX Storage Architecture With Broad Industry Adoption
summary: NVIDIA BlueField-4 STX Storage BlueField-4 STX is a modular reference architecture that enables enterprises, cloud and AI providers to easily deploy accelerated storage infrastructure capable of the long-context reasoning required for agentic AI. headline: Super Micro Computer Deepens AI Data Center Role With New Alliances
summary: Over the past two weeks, Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) has announced multiple new collaborations focused on AI data center infrastructure. The company signed a memorandum of understanding with SK Telecom and Schneider Electric to provide pre-fabricated, modular AI data centers. SMCI is working with BlockchAIn LLC on integrated, power-secured AI platforms aimed at data center deployment. Mirantis has validated Supermicro's modular server architecture for Kubernetes-native AI...
